_comment: Single source of truth for the causal-repair benchmark. Model ids are OpenRouter ids; ':floor' routes to the cheapest provider. Kimi must stay on the official Moonshot provider (third-party hosts do not execute its tool calls; pinned in bench/router/litellm.config.yaml). Four canonical cells: three bare baselines and the harness (Qwen patches/judges + MiMo investigates/reviews/verifies, hooks + PCR witnesses + coverage gate + runner-enforced retry loop).
_prices_comment: OpenRouter USD per 1M tokens (verified 2026-07). Used for real cost, since Claude Code's reported total_cost_usd misprices non-Anthropic models routed via the proxy.

kimi-baseline.role: bare Kimi K2.6 - the frontier reference bar

harness.role: the full harness (v0.4.3): adaptive triage skill + hooks + PCR per-clause witnesses + change-surface coverage gate + runner-enforced retry loop. Qwen authors patches/judges; MiMo investigates/reviews/verifies.
